headline: RETURNS: GUILTY UNTIL PROVEN COMPLIANT
subheading: Quarantine, cold-chain evidence and the documented disposition decisions MHRA inspectors expect to see.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial pharmaceutical scene evoking GDP returns and quarantine: a clean unbranded medicine carton suspended at a luminous decision gateway where one glowing teal pathway curves back toward ordered saleable shelving and a second dimmer path diverges away, symbolising re-issue versus destruction. A small temperature-data logger emits a delicate cyan waveform ribbon tracing a controlled cold-chain history, set against a calm deep navy distribution-facility backdrop with softly blurred warehouse racking and a faint cold-store door in elegant bokeh. Subtle frosted 2-8 degree cold mist drifts low, a single restrained green accent marks the approved route, brushed-steel surfaces and soft volumetric side light convey traceability, control and clinical precision, premium clinical-luxury aesthetic, layered depth, refined minimalism. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
